planned_lemmas.name: coordinatewise dominance inheritance
planned_lemmas.planned_claim: Under RSW-VF-H2-001 through RSW-VF-H2-003, the memory-ledger trajectory coordinatewise dominates the null trajectory.

planned_lemmas.name: strict local activation witness
planned_lemmas.planned_claim: Under RSW-VF-H2-004 through RSW-VF-H2-006, the witness coordinate has a strict memory-ledger advantage.

planned_lemmas.name: derived strict witness condition
planned_lemmas.planned_claim: The restricted structural witness conditions imply the strict witness condition required for strict positive ledger_effect_size.

planned_lemmas.name: positive aggregate conclusion
planned_lemmas.planned_claim: A strict witness with positive aggregation weight and nonnegative weights implies ledger_effect_size > 0.

planned_theorem.name: restricted structural witness strict positivity theorem
planned_theorem.planned_statement: In the finite coordinatewise toy domain, if RSW-VF-H2-001 through RSW-VF-H2-007 hold, then ledger_effect_size > 0.

proof_order: Use TTP-VF-H2-001 to inherit coordinatewise dominance under decomposed monotonicity.
Prove strict local activation witness from strict ledger readout advantage, strict activation margin, and non-saturation.
Combine dominance and strict local witness to derive the strict witness condition.
Use TTP-VF-H2-002 to convert strict witness plus positive aggregation weight into ledger_effect_size > 0.
remaining_boundaries: The generalized ordered-domain theorem remains not ready.
The strict activation margin is an explicit sufficient condition, not derived from deeper primitives.
The theorem remains safe abstract toy only.
No empirical, biological, external, or literature validation is introduced.

rsw_conditions.name: finite coordinatewise state domain
rsw_conditions.statement: V is finite and x_t is in [0,1]^V with coordinatewise order.

rsw_conditions.name: matched coupled processes
rsw_conditions.statement: Memory-ledger and null processes share initial state, horizon, graph, and symbolic inputs.

rsw_conditions.name: decomposed monotonicity
rsw_conditions.statement: Ledger increments are nonnegative, ledger readout is order-preserving, the state component is order-preserving, and activation is monotone in ledger readout.

rsw_conditions.name: strict local ledger readout advantage
rsw_conditions.statement: At a reachable witness pair, persistent ledger readout is strictly greater than null ledger readout.

rsw_conditions.name: strict activation margin
rsw_conditions.statement: At the witness pair, the activation map is strictly increasing over the relevant ledger-readout interval.

rsw_conditions.name: non-saturation
rsw_conditions.statement: The witness coordinate is not clipped or saturated in a way that removes the strict activation difference.

rsw_conditions.name: positive aggregation witness weight
rsw_conditions.statement: The witness node-time pair has strictly positive aggregation weight and all aggregation weights are nonnegative.
